context: You are visiting a doctor at a clinic in Amman. You are not feeling well and need to describe your symptoms.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you have a headache and a fever

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: How long have you been sick?

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: فهمت. هل هناك أعراض أخرى؟ سعال أو زكام؟
exchanges.translation: I see. Are there other symptoms? A cough or a cold?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say yes, you also have a cough

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: سأكتب لك دواء. خذه ثلاث مرات في اليوم بعد الأكل.
exchanges.translation: I will prescribe medicine for you. Take it three times a day after meals.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask if you need to come back

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: نعم، ارجع بعد أسبوع. إذا ساءت حالتك، اتصل فوراً.
exchanges.translation: Yes, come back in a week. If your condition worsens, call immediately.
